channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 12 unmissable tech gifts under $50 that will definitely arrive in time for Father's Day
item.description: Unmissable Father's Day 2026 gift guide: From smart alarm clocks to rechargeable air dusters, these practical tech gifts are perfect for dads everywhere.

item.title: 'Transformative for renters or those on lower incomes': The plug-in balcony solar revolution just took a step closer in the UK — as Asda, Amazon and B&Q have government talks over tech that could cut your bills by 30%
item.description: Adding some solar energy to your household mix is about to get much easier if you're in the UK.

item.title: Netflix has shared the highly anticipated trailer for Heartstopper Forever — and the final installment has an interactive feature for fans to enjoy
item.description: Heartstopper Forever is the final installment in Charlie and Nick's love story, and Netflix wants fans to be a huge part of it.

item.title: Massive VPN surge hits India as government blocks Telegram over exam fraud
item.description: India has temporarily blocked Telegram ahead of the NEET-UG 2026 re-exam, driving millions to VPNs and prompting Telegram to challenge the order in court amid allegations of internet hijacking.

item.title: The Garmin Fenix 9 and Enduro 4 could be launching soon, code spotted in Garmin Connect app suggests
item.description: The evidence for a Garmin Fenix 9 range launch this year is mounting up.

item.title: 'The best budget laptop you can buy': Apple MacBook Neo gets a surprise £50 Amazon discount — and it's perfect for business and back-to-school buyers
item.description: Apple's MacBook Neo has been discounted by £50 on Amazon, making the AI-ready laptop with its A18 Pro chip an even better buy for students, professionals and everyday users

item.title: Best Laptops (2026): My Top Recommendations
item.description: I’ve been reviewing laptops for over a decade, and this is my advice on how to find the right laptop for you.

item.title: My backyard made me a color-changing smart lighting convert
item.description: I'll admit it. I was wrong. Wildly colorful lighting is delightful for your smart home - well, outdoors, at least. Smart lighting is one of my favorite features of the smart home - it combines convenience with ambiance, letting you change the entire look of your room with just a press of a button. But, […]

item.title: 7 of the best Android 17 features available now — from Bubbles to Screen Reactions
item.description: Android 17 is rolling out to Pixel devices now, and it's packed full of new and improved features — here are the best of them.

item.title: 'Quirky design, unbeatable speed and quality': Bambu Lab's 5-star 3D printer for beginners just dropped to an unmissable price in the 4th anniversary sale
item.description: The fast and accurate A1 Mini is our Editor's Choice, setting a new bar for entry-level 3D printing.

item.title: The White House app will reportedly be auto-installed on Homeland Security staff's devices
item.description: The White House app will be automatically loaded onto DHS staff's work phones, Politico said.

item.title: Spotify's new Track Reactions update gives you yet more ways to judge your friends' music taste in Collaborative Playlists — but I'd like the emoji list to be even more brutal
item.description: Spotify's new Track Reactions give you a new way to interact with your friends in Collaborative Playlists.

item.title: Xiaomi Robot Vacuum H50 Pro : ce nouveau robot aspirateur ultra-puissant (15 000 Pa) profite déjà d’une baisse de prix
item.description: À peine sorti, le tout nouveau robot aspirateur Xiaomi Robot Vacuum H50 Pro passe déjà de 499 euros à 449 euros sur le site officiel de la marque.

item.title: 'The credential data leak is dangerous simply because of its enormous size': Experts warn "colossal" breach exposes 24 billion records including personal info
item.description: Someone has been hoarding data leaks from across the web and putting them in a single Elasticsearch instance.

item.title: À 15 ans, il pirate l’ANTS sans compétences et récupère 12 millions de données
item.description: Le piratage inquiétant de l’ANTS, ayant conduit à la fuite de millions de données personnelles de Français, aurait pu être évité. De récentes informations suggèrent qu’une erreur humaine aurait permis au pirate de s’introduire dans la base de données de l’agence. En s’appuyant sur l’intelligence artificielle, le jeune hacker n’aurait rencontré aucune difficulté majeure pour mener à bien son méfait. ...

item.title: Google Earth cache un simulateur de vol gratuit sur navigateur (et c’est ultra fun)
item.description: Google a ajouté un simulateur de vol dans sa version sur navigateur.

item.title: Uber will bring its premium robotaxi service to Houston in 2027
item.description: This will be the second market to have an Uber robotaxi service outfitted with Lucid EVs equipped with a self-driving system from Nuro.

item.title: Pinterest launches an experimental AI shopping app called ‘Ask Pinterest’
item.description: Pinterest has launched 'Ask Pinterest,' an experimental AI-powered shopping app that lets users seek recommendations and inspiration through a conversational interface.

item.title: How to watch England at World Cup 2026: FREE streams, fixtures, team news
item.description: With the Three Lions amongst the tournament favourites, here's how to watch England at World Cup 2026, including FREE streams, fixtures and team news.

item.title: What is the release date for Rick and Morty season 9 episode 5 on Adult Swim, HBO Max, and Hulu?
item.description: For the millionth time, the Smith family is under attack this week. But when is Rick and Morty season 9 episode 5 coming to a streaming platform near you?

item.title: Focal's new Doctor Who-esque speakers cost as much as a Porsche 911, but they’re here to exterminate the competition
item.description: The new Focal Diva Alta Utopia may look like Daleks who missed their call time for a Doctor Who shoot, but there's a whole lot of hi-fi going on under the hood.

item.title: Why security leaders are cautious about agentic AI
item.description: Agentic AI can improve security operations, but only with strong oversight and real context.

item.title: Après le suicide d’une utilisatrice de ChatGPT, OpenAI est la cible d’une nouvelle plainte
item.description: Une Canadienne accuse ChatGPT d’avoir encouragé les idées suicidaires de sa fille avant son décès et poursuit OpenAI en justice.

item.title: ‘The agentic enterprise is happening right here, right now’: Google Cloud hails the AI age for businesses everywhere
item.description: Google Cloud reveals HSBC, UK Government partnerships to help accelerate the AI age.

item.title: WhatsApp is testing read-once disappearing messages
item.description: WhatsApp is finally catching up to rivals with disappearing messages.

item.title: Pour l’été, Amazon casse le prix de cette batterie externe de 45 W équipée de deux câbles USB-C
item.description: Sur le site d'Amazon, l'Anker Zolo est quasiment disponible à moitié prix puisque l'enseigne l'affiche à 24,99 euros. Une occasion parfaite pour acquérir un appareil endurant avec une batterie de 20 000 mAh délivrant une puissance de charge de 45 W.

item.title: West Antarctica Is Missing Way Too Much Ice
item.description: Temperatures have climbed up to 45 degrees Fahrenheit above normal, stopping ice from forming in the dead of Antarctic winter.

item.title: Tim Heidecker Wants to Turn Infowars Into Adult Swim for the Internet
item.description: Infowars’ would-be creative director talks Sandy Hook, comedy’s MAGA turn, and why the future of satire may look more like a streaming startup than a late-night show.

item.title: The Kodak WPZ2 is less than half the price of Tough TG-7 — even still, should you buy it? I tested the cheap waterproof camera on vacation, and here’s my verdict
item.description: One of the most affordable rugged cameras around, the Kodak PixPro WPZ2 is a 16MP point-and-shoot that's waterproof to 15m.

item.title: The anti-humanoid: Why Genesis AI’s new robot design isn’t a fake human
item.description: Genesis AI is betting against the tech industry’s obsession with bipedal humanoids with Eno, a foldable robot with a minimalist geometric design. Genesis AI is betting against the tech industry’s obsession with bipedal, human-mimicking robots. Their first general-purpose machine, Eno, pairs millimeter-precise dexterous, human-like hands with a minimalist, wheeled base that can dynamically fold away out of sight. It’s a general purpose robot, designed to do anything you can imagine, from factory jobs to household chores, but its first deployment will be in labs....

item.title: Is technical literacy the new MBA?
item.description: In the age of AI, what’s worth more? Traditional business degrees once guaranteed a path to leadership, but today’s market increasingly rewards technical literacy over classroom credentials. The shift reflects a fundamental change in how companies measure capability and potential. Below, industry veterans and hiring managers examine whether hands-on platform mastery has become more valuable than an MBA for modern professionals....

item.title: Why most AI projects don’t deliver ROI and how to fix it
item.description: By now, almost every enterprise has an AI story. Years into the AI boom, disappointment has become a familiar refrain.

item.title: The Acer Nitro KGB271U is a 27-inch 1440p monitor at an almost absurdly low price right now
item.description: A 200Hz IPS panel with FreeSync Premium and HDR10 at 27 inches and 1440p — now just $160 at Best Buy.

item.title: For Iran’s Athletes, There Is No Separating Sports From Politics
item.description: From defections and protests to moments of national pride, the 2026 World Cup arrives amid decades of tension between identity and the state.

item.title: 'I'm delighted to be wrong about this' — Sam Altman says one of his biggest fears about AI hasn't come true
item.description: Sam Altman says AI has not disrupted white-collar employment as quickly as he expected.

item.title: 'No customer or user wakes up and says, "I hope I get to talk to a chat bot or an AI agent today"': Survey claims brands which sound more "human" will get ahead in the AI age
item.description: Shoppers and customers are crying out for real human connections – they only want to use AI as a discovery layer, much like Google.

item.title: New York Knicks championship parade: Parade route, time, livestream details
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the New York Knicks parade on Thursday, June 18, including livestream information, parade route details, and more.

item.title: The end of the AI honeymoon? ChatGPT market share falls below 50% for first time
item.description: OpenAI still has over a billion monthly active ChatGPT users, but consumers are also increasingly choosing Gemini.

item.title: Samsung tient peut-être l’ingrédient parfait pour les lunettes connectées du futur
item.description: Samsung Display a dévoilé deux nouveaux micro-écrans basés sur la technologie d'affichage OLEDoS, pensés spécifiquement pour la prochaine génération de lunettes connectées. Ces écrans prennent des airs d'ingrédients clés pour le développement de la future génération de smart glasses.

item.title: Mullvad VPN’s new desktop build prioritizes speed, stability over interface changes
item.description: Mullvad's desktop apps just got a major update focused on delivering faster speeds and security fixes. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: Vérification d’âge sur les sites pornos : l’Europe tranche enfin, mais la décision arrive après la bataille
item.description: La Cour de justice de l'Union européenne (CJUE) a validé le principe d'une vérification d'âge imposée par la France aux plateformes pornographiques étrangères, sous conditions. Une décision qui bouscule l'industrie du X.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for June 17, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for June 17, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for June 17, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1824 on June 17 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Prime Day is next week: Here are 20+ early deals to start shopping now
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is coming June 23. Shop early Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Hisense TVs, and Anker power stations.

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for June 17, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the June 17, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.

item.title: What business leaders are getting wrong about AI’s impact on entry-level jobs
item.description: Companies that fail to reshape early-career roles for the AI economy risk cutting off their future talent pipeline. The loudest voices in today’s AI debate warn that entry-level jobs are disappearing and that young workers will be the first casualties of automation.

item.title: KiWear : plus qu’une bague de santé, cette bague connectée contrôle télé, voiture et téléphone par gestes
item.description: KiWear prépare une bague connectée qui ne se contente pas de mesurer le sommeil : elle veut servir de télécommande gestuelle pour piloter téléphone, télé, voiture ou PC. Un Kickstarter est annoncé pour juillet 2026.

item.title: Interactive. Violent. Gross. Inside Fishtank, the Unhinged Future of Reality TV
item.description: It’s like Big Brother without any limits, or broadcast standards. WIRED goes on location—and on camera—with the cult hit.

item.title: Pursuing a 6-figure income? These 15 high-paying jobs didn’t exist a decade ago
item.description: AI disrupted the current job market—and created a long list of new roles with impressive salaries across tech, medicine, HR, IT, marketing, and more. Artificial intelligence is disrupting the current job market, leaving a trail of corporate layoffs and workers scrambling to determine what positions will be safe in the future.

item.title: These fake AI ads are perfectly soulless
item.description: These ads might be fake, but they skewer a real problem: AI ‘slop voice’ that made nonsense the new normal. There’s a specific voice and vagueness to technology advertising today.

item.title: Accessibility is more than a design problem
item.description: From adaptive iPhone grips to a $3,500 headset, Apple’s latest crop of assistive products shows why inclusive design depends on more than the technology itself. Last month, Apple marked Global Accessibility Awareness Day with a sweeping round of accessibility updates and announcements, including a new eye-controlled wheelchair interface for Vision Pro and the global launch of Los Angeles-based designer Bailey Hikawa’s adaptive MagSafe Grip & Stand for iPhone. Together, the announcements span nearly the entire spectrum of assistive technology, from a $3,500 spatial computing headset to a silico...

item.title: Ian Bremmer’s warning on America’s brand: ‘The United States is not respected’
item.description: The Eurasia Group president says America’s global standing is shakier than it looks, and the country’s next revolution is overdue. As America hurtles toward its 250th birthday, the world is watching. Ian Bremmer, Eurasia Group President and PBS host, gives his unvarnished read on the state of Brand America. He shares how he’s advising business and political leaders around the globe, why he believes the US is overdue for a revolution, and what the widening gap between American wealth and American opportunity means for the country’s standing in the world. ...

item.title: Navimow casse ses prix pour le Prime Day : quel robot tondeuse choisir pour son jardin ? [Sponso]
item.description: Du 16 au 30 juin, Segway Navimow profite du Prime Day pour afficher des remises pouvant atteindre 500 euros sur certains modèles. De quoi trouver le robot tondeuse le plus adapté à son jardin et au meilleur prix.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for June 17, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: Ce puissant laptop de 17 pouces (RTX 5070, Ryzen 7) s’affiche à prix cassé avec 400 € de remise sur Amazon
item.description: Si vous cherchez une machine de guerre pour jouer confortablement à vos jeux AAA, l'Acer Nitro V 17 AI devrait vous plaire. Ce PC portable armé d'une RTX 5070 s'affiche actuellement à 1 799 euros au lieu de 2 199 euros sur Amazon.
